ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (1 = survived, 0 = did not survive) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = first, 2 = second, 3 = third) */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the passenger (1 = male, 2 = female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Passenger fare */,
  "embarked" INTEGER /* Embarkation point (1 = Cherbourg, 2 = Southampton, 3 = Queenstown) */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = First, 2 = Second, 3 = Third) */,
  "who" TEXT /* Passenger type (man, woman, child) */,
  "deck" INTEGER /* Deck (1 = A, 2 = B, 3 = C, etc.) */,
  "embark_town" INTEGER /* Embarkation town (1 = Cherbourg, 2 = Southampton, 3 = Queenstown) */,
  "alive" TEXT /* Survival status (yes or no) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number if available */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for travel (e.g., business, pleasure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_deck FOREIGN KEY ("deck") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embark_town FOREIGN KEY ("embark_town") REFERENCES embarkation_towns ("embarkation_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "fare_range" TEXT /* Range of fares for the class */,
  "deck_range" TEXT /* Range of decks for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (male or female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of passengers of this sex */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of passengers of this sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point (C = Cherbourg, S = Southampton, Q = Queenstown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embarkation point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the embarkation point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the embarkation point */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare of passengers embarking from this point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., cash, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck (A, B, C, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deck */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the deck can hold */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of facilities available on the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_towns" (
  "embarkation_town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation town */,
  "embarkation_town_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation town */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embarkation town */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the embarkation town */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the embarkation town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., husband, wife, child) */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship started */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relationships_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "crew_position" TEXT /* Position of the crew member */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crew member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the crew member joined the Titanic */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date when the crew member left the Titanic (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the survival factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survival factor */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the factor in survival analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of passengers */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survival factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the sample */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the survival rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the deck was allocated to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_allocations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_allocations_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embarkation point */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the embarkation point was allocated to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_allocations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_embarkation_allocations_embarkation_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_id") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fare was allocated to the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_allocations_fare_id FOREIGN KEY ("fare_id") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_allocations_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)
